## What changed?

Describe the change in plain English.

## Why?

Why does this need to exist?

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m build --wheel`
- [ ] command-line smoke test(s) relevant to the change

## Repo impact

Check every box that applies:

- [ ] touches live roots
- [ ] touches artifact roots
- [ ] touches `.dreaming/` runtime outputs
- [ ] changes docs only
- [ ] changes release-facing text
- [ ] changes apply / discard / validation / backup behavior
- [ ] changes memory, user, skill, or fact writeback behavior
- [ ] introduces or references secrets, tokens, or private data

## Notes

- Link the related issue.
- Call out any safety assumptions.
- Include screenshots or logs if they help.
